holdings.infoBox: EWO is an equity ETF with a total of 27 individual holdings.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI Austria ETF (EWO) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Austria IMI 25-50 index, a market-cap-weighted index of Austrian firms that covers the entire market-cap spectrum. EWO was launched on Mar 12, 1996 and is issued by BlackRock.
